name: Energy Monitoring
description: Consumes meter readings, records energy consumption and detects consumption spikes against a rolling baseline.
author: FactoryOS

api.description: A tenant's live per-meter readings: the latest value against its rolling baseline and how far above (or below) it sits, in percent.
A tenant's most recent detected consumption spikes, newest first.
A tenant's energy headline: meters tracked and spikes retained.
